workflow.name: Enrich Google Sheets data with the Tavily Research API
workflow.description:
Enrich your CSV data with web-sourced information using Tavily's AI-powered research API. This workflow fills in missing data for existing columns without creating new ones.

Video Link: https://youtu.be/8g8v3vNyhe4

## How it works
- Reads rows from a Google Sheet
- For missing values, finds information from the web using Tavily Research
- Maps results to existing columns
- Writes the enriched data to a new sheet
- Retries automatically until results are ready (up to ~5 minutes)

## Setup steps
1) Prepare your sheet
2) Create the columns you want filled (e.g. CEO, revenue, HQ - if the data is related to company information)
3) Create an empty output sheet
4) Add credentials
5) Google Sheets OAuth for both sheet nodes
6) Tavily API key for the research nodes
7) Configure and run
8) Enter the Google Sheet ID and sheet names (For both the CSV nodes)
9) Click Start

Requirements: Google account (For sheets) and Tavily API key

parameters.content:
## Data Enrichment with Tavily Research API
Fill in missing company data in your Google Sheet using Tavily’s web research. This is mainly for existing columns (You must manually add column names that you want to enrich, if they do not exist).

## How it works
- Reads rows from a Google Sheet
- For missing values, finds information from the web using Tavily Research
- Maps results to existing columns
- Writes the enriched data to a new sheet
- Retries automatically until results are ready (up to ~5 minutes)

## Setup steps
1) Prepare your sheet
2) Create the columns you want filled (e.g. CEO, revenue, HQ - if the data is related to company information)
3) Create an empty output sheet
4) Add credentials
5) Google Sheets OAuth for both sheet nodes
6) Tavily API key for the research nodes
7) Configure and run
8) Enter the Google Sheet ID and sheet names (For both the CSV nodes)
9) Click Start

Requirements: Google account (For sheets) and Tavily API key

## Data Input

Reads company data from Google Sheets

## Research Initiation

Prepares data and starts Tavily research requests

## Polling Loop

Waits and checks research status until complete (max 5 min)

## Data Output

Merges enriched data and writes to Google Sheets

## ⚠️ Important Setup Step

**Before running:**

1. Create an empty output sheet in the same Google Sheets document as your input data

2. The output sheet will receive the enriched data

Example:
- Input: "companies"
- Output: "enriched_companies"

data.details:
The IF node can be used to implement binary conditional logic in your workflow. You can set up one-to-many conditions to evaluate each item of data being inputted into the node. That data will either evaluate to TRUE or FALSE and route out of the node accordingly.

This node has multiple types of conditions: Bool, String, Number, and Date & Time.
